entry.title: Re: How to extend 500 GL codes to 4 new company codes
entry.content: Hello and thank you for your Response  @raymond_giuseppi  raymond_giuseppi Sorry I could not see how to leave a comment on your answer I have FS15 and FS16 available I will have a look at their help sections, is there any thing to watch out for and it there a template download for FS16 Ian

entry.title: Re: Title: ErrorMessage: App could not be opened because...
entry.content:
@arbazshaikh 

Try opening the browser's developer tools and see if there are any errors in the network tab or in the console.

entry.title: SAP Integration Suite Monthly Webinar - November 2024
entry.content:
SAP Integration Suite is an integration platform-as-a-service (iPaaS) that enables the design, development, execution, governance, curation, analysis, and management of the full lifecycle of integration flows, APIs, and high-volume business events that connect on-premises and cloud-based processes, services, applications, and data across organizations. SAP Integration Suite is available on multiple cloud providers.

In this webinar, we'll have two sections:

Product Updates: Get updates on key capabilities and latest enhancements released for SAP Integration Suite.


OR

#AskAnythingIntegration: Our panel of experts will answer any questions you have on integration.

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP Post-Refresh Steps with SAP GUI Scripting (Part 2)
entry.content:
Hello Mohammed,
thanks for the information. So no PCA tool or anything similar. Sorry, but I have serious doubts about the usefulness of this method and would not rely on GUI scripting and SE16 etc. even without a tool. It is shaky and prone to errors. With SE16, you would have to check for each table whether the selection of list fields is complete. Some tables cannot be accessed at all with this method (e.g. SWNCMONI (-> ST03), contains an LRAW field). I cannot imagine that SAP customers who rely on this method will find a complete and error-free system refresh as a result. Programs or scripts that want to further process the displayed data (which first has to be saved as files somewhere) have to know and take into account the structure. And client-specific data (e.g. users) would then also have to be processed individually for each client.
The use of transports of copies would be the better and more reliable option, but requires manual effort. If no tool is available, I would tend to use R3trans scripts, but that is also time-consuming. But that would at least give you the option of using it in automated processes.
The "SAP Landscape Virtualization Management (LVM), enterprise edition license" required to use the PCA tool costs a lot of money. If that is too expensive, there are cheaper alternatives, including my company's solution. The costs are definitely recouped by the secure, complete and automated processing of pre- and post-work. 
Kind regards
Jan

entry.title: What is the difference between Write and Preprocessing option?
entry.content:
Hi,

Can someone please explain the difference between Write and Preprocessing Variant Type?

I would want to run archiving job for the business partner and while maintaining variant for it, the system is asking to select Variant type.

System: S4HANA public cloud

Scope ID: 1KA

Thanks,
Rushi

entry.title: Re: I want to fetch the sgtxt on sap script form on main...
entry.content: Did you solve your issue?

entry.title: Proposal value field on compensation sheet
entry.content:
Hi,

The “proposal” field only proposes a value in the launching of the compensation sheets.

If an employee changes his Salary, Could the proposal value updated in relation to this change?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Intercompany billing: can price date be taken from Billing date?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have an issue.

We are working with stock transport orders (UB) to relocate goods from one plant to the other (different company codes). We have some troubles with picking the prices in the intercompany invoice.

Example:

We have 2 condition records
Condition type PI01- 1.02.2024 - 28.02.2024 = 50 rs
Condition type PI01- 1.03.2024 - 31.03.2024 = 55 rs

For the Open STO PO below is the scenario, 

1. the stock transport order is created on 15.02.2024 --> here the price date is 15.02.2024

2. the delivery is created on 15.03.2024 (PGI date 15.03.2024)

3. the intercompany invoice is created. On item level for the condition type PI01 is placed the pricing date 15.02.2024.

Our requirement is, For Open PO  which created in February are being delivered and invoiced on March.
So the billing invoice should pick the pricing condition record from delivery date
i,e 15.03.2024 =55rs.

Dear all SAP experts, Please throw some light on this issue as this is an urgent requirement.
FYI,
Copy control maintained in VTFL is,
Price type - B 
Price Source - A


thanks for help.

entry.title: Re: SAP Content Server maintenance date
entry.content: @owen8855 SAP Content Agent service is a different service on SAP BTP and not related to it. Kindly remove this tag.

entry.title: SAP Inside Track Netherlands (sitNL)
entry.content:
https://community.sap.com/t5/s-hertogenbosch-events/sap-inside-track-the-netherlands-sitnl-2024-max-80/ev-p/13896441

Join our 14th episode of SAP Inside Track Netherlands, sitNL in short. A Saturday well spent with tons of content, inspiration and fun. sitNL will deliver an outstanding agenda again for SAP developers, integrators, data analysts and everyone else interested. With a tech and data track and ending with a pubquiz, sitNL is a different experience that you need to part of for at least once in your SAP life.

entry.title: Re: How to handle wastage in production process of SAP Bu...
entry.content:
Hi, @ali93 

Check this thread out. It can be helpful: How to handle wastage in production - SAP Community

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: Re: DTP Load Failure due to Overflow converting Issue
entry.content:
Hi Roland,

Thanks for your reply.

As per your suggestion ,I checked Tcode ODQMON in source system but i am just getting an entry with my CDS related Data source as shown below.

Not able to display the data which has been sent out from the above request  and even i verified the data length of all CURR/QUAN/DEC fields and all are having odd number of digits as the length.

I have given Plant range and tried to extract but still its failing due to same issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Content Server maintenance date
entry.content:
Dears,

We have got the confirmation that 

The Content Server maintenance data depends on the product we use,
so if we are connecting Content Server with SAP NetWeaver then support is until 2027,
so if we are connecting Content Server with S/4 HANA then support is until 2040.

Thanks for your reply!

Best Regards,

owen8855

entry.title: Re: Intercompany billing: can price date be taken from Bi...
entry.content: @Lakshmipathi  similar issue we are also facing , can you please guide us on this pricing date issue in STO Open PO's. ( for old open PO's  when ever we do delivery then it should pick same date as pricing date instead po creation date, so in the billing document we can see the new pricing date with new condition value)

entry.title: Re: Automating SAP Post-Refresh Steps with SAP GUI Scripting (Part 2)
entry.content:
Hello Jan,

Thank you for your detailed feedback and for sharing your perspective. I appreciate your insights, especially regarding the use of tools like SAP PCA and alternatives such as R3trans scripts. You’ve raised some valid points, but let me clarify a few aspects and address your concerns directly.

Firstly, while I agree that using PCA or similar tools can streamline processes, the reality is that not every SAP customer has access to these due to budget constraints or specific business decisions. This is precisely why I developed the GUI scripting approach as a flexible and cost-effective alternative. It caters to clients who need reliable, automated solutions without the financial overhead of purchasing enterprise licenses for tools like LVM or PCA. Dismissing the method entirely overlooks the practical needs of many organizations that prioritize efficiency over tool dependency.

Regarding the perceived instability of GUI scripting, I would argue that it’s all about robust script design and thorough testing. The scripts I’ve developed have been extensively validated and include error-handling mechanisms tailored to specific scenarios, significantly reducing the risk of failure. Additionally, they are designed to handle common edge cases, ensuring reliable execution even without access to advanced tools. For instance, the SU01 post-refresh automation script has demonstrated a 95% time savings while maintaining an error-free execution record across multiple environments, proving its effectiveness in real-world scenarios. For exporting RFCs, I use SE10 via scripting. Others were possible alternatives. 

Lastly, I recognize that PCA and similar enterprise solutions offer a secure and streamlined experience, but the cost barrier is very real for many clients, particularly those operating with tight budgets. I’m glad you mentioned your company’s solution as an alternative, but the reality is that not every organization can justify the investment. My approach fills a crucial gap for these customers, offering a tailored solution that meets their needs without the financial strain.

I appreciate the dialogue and the opportunity to discuss these technical considerations. It’s through these exchanges that we can better understand the diverse needs of SAP customers and the variety of solutions available.

 

Kind regards,

Mohammed Safwanullah Shareef

entry.title: Re: SAP Business ByDesign – What’s New 24.11
entry.content:
Hi,

with SAP Business ByDesign 24.11. there was an enhancement to the Home Work Center with the additional tiles under Self Service (Time Recording, Expense Reports, Create Expense Reports, Shopping Carts, Leave Request, Create Leave Requests).

It is not possible to control these Icons with the UI-switches, as it works with the Self-Service-Center.

Is there any other way to control which tiles are visible to the users and which are not shown, apart from personalisation mode?

Thanks!

entry.title: onClick() event in SAc Scripting,
entry.content:
I am really stuck and i didn't find anything helpful, 

I want to show measure and dimension on click event through button through scripting in sac story.

my model name is "account" my measure name is "net_sales" my dimension type is account. appearantly there is no error in it. but i am not getting anything when click on button 

 

 


// Chart_1.getDataSource().setDimensionFilter("Account", ["Revenue"]);

// Chart_1.getDataSource().setMemberDisplayMode(Feed.CategoryAxis,"net_sales");

Chart_1.addDimension("account",Feed.CategoryAxis2);

// Chart_1.addDimension("account",Feed.CategoryAxis2);
console.log(['dimension',Chart_1.addDimension("Revenue",Feed.CategoryAxis2)]);

Chart_1.addMeasure("[account].[parentId].&[A100000]",Feed.ValueAxis);
console.log(['measure',Chart_1.addMeasure("[account].[parentId].&[A200100]",Feed.ValueAxis)]);

 

// Chart_1.addMeasure("[account].[parentId].&[A200100]",Feed.ValueAxis);

entry.title: Re: Material Groups Dependency
entry.content:
Hi @marianpopa 
Seems you want to use the functionality of product hierarchy concept without using product hierarchy field.
I am not sure about this in standard way, Below is my suggestion.
Try to Incorporate new categorization in the existing product hierarchy structure.
Otherwise with the help of ABAPer you may inter link Material group 1, 2 and 3 fields. But sales org. is mandatory for mg1-3, not like product hierarchy field.
If the material master maintained by a single team, you may guide them to enter the fields in a required manner.
examples:
mg1 - mg2 - mg3
A   - A0  - A01 or A   - AA  - AAA
same formula like product hierarchy.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hi, @David_Chaviano 

I'm a recent graduate with a strong foundation in mathematics and economics, and I'm eager to dive into the field of SAP data analysis. My academic background has equipped me with analytical skills and a solid grasp of statistical concepts, and I'm ready to apply these in the real world.

I'm actively exploring opportunities to learn and grow in SAP data analytics, aiming to work with data-driven solutions that can drive informed decision-making and business success. If anyone has insights, resources, or potential openings in this area, I'd love to connect and learn more!

entry.title: Re: Field for creation user is missing in source referenc...
entry.content: In the table creation script, you need to change the type of createdby to abp_creation_user and lastchangedby to abp_locinst_lastchange_user.

entry.title: Can we deploy sapui5 web components app onto S/4 HANA on-premise?
entry.content:
Hello, 

Can we deploy an application built using SAPUI5 Web Components on to S/4 HANA on-premise system? Can you please help with the guides if yes. 

I Know we can deploy to BTP. 

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error During MDK Project Deployment o...
entry.content:
@Riyaz_abdul 

While we provide a permanant fix, here is workaround you may want to look at to continue accessing your MDK web app:

  • Open WebApplicationFactory folder in SAP Business Application Studio (if you do not see it in the project explorer, make sure to open explorer at Projects folder level. File>Open Folder >Projects) 
  • Right click mta.yaml and click Build MTA Project
  • Right click the .mtar file in mta_archives and click Deploy MTA Archive.
  • Once the deploy task is completed, access the MDK web app.

entry.title: Re: Whenever I deployed MDK project in cloud foundry givi...
entry.content:
@Sourabh1 

While we provide a permanant fix, here is workaround you may want to look at to continue accessing your MDK web app:

  • Open WebApplicationFactory folder in SAP Business Application Studio (if you do not see it in the project explorer, make sure to open explorer at Projects folder level. File>Open Folder >Projects) 
  • Right click mta.yaml and click Build MTA Project
  • Right click the .mtar file in mta_archives and click Deploy MTA Archive.
  • Once the deploy task is completed, access the MDK web app.

entry.title: SSAM 2405 Geometry update
entry.content:
Dear All,

We are implementing the SSAM 2405 version with ESRI map services.

We have a scenario where field equipment already exists and user can see in SSAM. Few old Equipment does not have the Geo coordinates available, and few equipment have wrong Geo coordinates in SSAM.

Now Client is using the SSAM 2405 version for asset auditing purpose where auditors will physically visit the site and update or add the Geo coordinates for the equipment.

I am unable to find the update or add feature in SSAM 2405 app. Pls advice how to enable this in SSAM 2405 version.

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve file content from SAP MDK attachments
entry.content: so you called the BPA endpoint via MDK? or something else? please let me know as im also facing this issue, Thanks.

entry.title: Convert Integer to Hexadecimal
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Hope you're having a good day!
Just wanted to ask how do you convert an integer to hexadecimal?
Currently I have this line of code.

DATA(lt_tabix) = sy-tabix.

which is then used to compare a hexadecimal value.

LOOP AT lt_table ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_var>) WHERE hex = lt_tabix

It will give me an error since 10 is not 0000000000000010 in hexa.
Really appreciate your replies in advance.

entry.title: Order statuses in Order confirmation API (CO_EDI_ORDER_CONF_REQUEST)
entry.content:
Hello,

Investigating to use SOAP API (CO_EDI_ORDER_CONF_REQUEST) for Sales Order/Customer Return - Confirm Processing (B2B)  (found here: https://api.sap.com/api/CO_EDI_ORDER_CONF_REQUEST/overview

But his API does not return any values for VBUK statuses on sales order header. For example Overall status, Rejection status, Delivery status, etc.

Do anyone know know which SOAP API for Order confirmations to use if one wants to include order status (based on VBUK)? 

BR,
TT

entry.title: Re: BEx Query Designer with SAP GUI 8.00 64bit and Office...
entry.content: Hi Bernhard, Thanks for your update, Office version detail?

entry.title: Call API returns code 500
entry.content:
Hello experts,

 

I try to access a service via ABAP code. The status code which is returned is 500 . The error message is: 'The message with Action '' can not be processed at the receiver, due to a ContractFilter mismatch at the EndpointDispatcher. This may be because of either a contract mismatch (mismatched Actions between sender and receiver) or a binding/security mismatch between the sender and the receiver.  Check that sender and receiver have the same contract and the same binding (including security requirements, e.g. Message, Transport, None).'

My code is

REPORT ztry.
DATA: im_url TYPE string
     ,lo_client TYPE REF TO if_http_client
     ,lv_send2url_xstring   TYPE xstring
     ,lv_send2url_string TYPE string
     .
im_url =       'https://xxxx/SOAP'.
cl_http_client=>create_by_url(
EXPORTING
  url                = im_url
IMPORTING
  client             = lo_client
EXCEPTIONS
  argument_not_found = 1
  plugin_not_active  = 2
  internal_error     = 3
  ).

IF sy-subrc IS NOT INITIAL.
  MESSAGE 'err' TYPE 'I'.
ENDIF.
*   "STEP-3 :  SET HTTP HEADERS
 CALL METHOD Lo_CLIENT->REQUEST->SET_HEADER_FIELD
      EXPORTING NAME  = 'Accept'
                VALUE = 'text/xml'.

 CALL METHOD Lo_CLIENT->REQUEST->SET_HEADER_FIELD
    EXPORTING NAME  =  '~request_method' 
*               VALUE = 'GET' .
               VALUE = 'POST' .

 CALL METHOD Lo_CLIENT->REQUEST->SET_CONTENT_TYPE
    EXPORTING CONTENT_TYPE  = 'text/xml' .
lv_send2url_string =
'<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://xxx/" xmlns:ns="http://xxx">' &&
'<soapenv:Header/>' &&
'<soapenv:Body>' &&
'<ns:method_name>' &&
'<ns:sSecno>xxx</ns:sSecno>' &&
'<ns:sPassword><xxx></ns:sPassword>' &&
'<ns:sOptionalID></ns:sOptionalID>' &&
'<ns:sTimeFrom>2024-11-01T12:00:00</ns:sTimeFrom>' &&
'<!--Optional:-->' &&
'<ns:sTimeTo>2023-11-07T12:00:00</ns:sTimeTo>' &&
'<ns:sMode></ns:sMode>' &&
'</ns:IMTimeStampSearch>' &&
'</soapenv:Body>' &&
'</soapenv:Envelope>' .

IF lv_send2url_string IS NOT INITIAL.
  CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_STRING_TO_XSTRING'
    EXPORTING
      text   = lv_send2url_string
    IMPORTING
      buffer = lv_send2url_xstring
    EXCEPTIONS
      failed = 1
      OTHERS = 2.

  CALL METHOD lo_client->request->set_data
    EXPORTING
      data = lv_send2url_xstring.
* STEP-5 :  SEND HTTP REQUEST
CALL METHOD lo_client->send
  EXCEPTIONS
    http_communication_failure = 1
    http_invalid_state         = 2.


* STEP-6 :  GET HTTP RESPONSE
CALL METHOD lo_client->receive
  EXCEPTIONS
    http_communication_failure = 1
    http_invalid_state         = 2
    http_processing_failed     = 3.


CALL METHOD lo_client->response->get_status
  IMPORTING
    code = DATA(l_status_code).


IF l_status_code = 200. "success
ENDIF.

CALL METHOD lo_client->response->get_cdata
  RECEIVING
    data = DATA(l_response_data).
lo_client->close( ).

Do you know what is the problem?

 Thanks in advanced

Hagit

entry.content:
Dear @villapandoa,

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/2c6e00fd27944d7aa6a2ff1231a76d29-323.html#send-email-notifications-about-approval-result-to-hard-coded-recipients-(for-example%2C-workflow-initiator-or-requestor)

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/2c6e00fd27944d7aa6a2ff1231a76d29-323.html#send-configurable-email-notifications-about-the-approval-result-to-selectable-recipients-using-email-templates

 

best regards,

Marius

entry.title: Asset transfer from (buliding asset to land asset)
entry.content:
Hi all 

I wanna to ask you when i did transfer asset within company code from asset class (building) to asset class (land) there is accum. Dep. has been transfered as well. Logically the receiver asset which the (land) asset class shall not dep. so how I adjust this accumulation dep posted on land asset in addition in future what the proper asset transfer in same this case when transfer from class dep. to another class not dep. 

waiting your usual support!

thank you !

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2019.001 v1.62 novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Olá, 

Novo problema: Implementei o preenchimento dos campos novos de crédito presumido usando a ADD_DATA e, inicialmente, funciona, preenche os campos corretamente e atualiza a tabela J_1BNFPRSMD_CRDT, porém, após alguns minutos os registros são excluídos da tabela standard, já tentei debugar e investigar os pontos onde a tabela é atualizada mas até o momento não consegui interceptar o processo (aparentemente é algum job). Analistas também não tem conhecimento de jobs de atualização de NF.

Obs.: o quadro com os campos novos ainda não está aparecendo na J1B*N, a equipe funcional ainda está trabalhando nas configurações para exibir o campo, mas os outros dados da NF continuam corretos mesmo após a tabela J_1BNFPRSMD_CRDT ter sido atualizada.

entry.title: Re: CERS01 Student
entry.content:
Hi @robertomejia2293 

The CERS01 SAP Certification Exam, One Attempt for Students is a subscription to SAP Certification.
It provides you a 12-months access to Certification Hub, where you can schedule one exam booking over your subscription period. Your subscription is valid for all available exams in the Certification Hub.
You need to decided which certification you want to take and hence prepare e.g. with the learning material we offer.
Please access our Student Zone website the we gathered the material and insights you need to succeed. 
There you find e.g. the Quick-start guides to get an overview and decide which topic you’d like to learn more about.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: A Complete Tutorial on OData-Based Adobe Forms for SAP Purchase Orders
entry.content: really helpful but there is a problem that the template that we copied is not saved in a Tr so how to move our changes

entry.title: Re: Enhancing SAP Support: Introducing Business Impact-Driven Case Prioritization
entry.content: A win-win for customers and SAP Support alike!

entry.title: Re: A Crystal Report instance failed to export
entry.content: what is the error? and which BI version / Crystal Reports version you are using

entry.title: Re: Recipe Development In SAP PLM
entry.content:
Hi there

I don't have the (i.e. comprehensive) answer for you. But recipe development data is stored in tables in the /PLMB/* namespace. E.g. /PLMB/RCP_RECIPE contains STATUS and RCP_USAGE. What I can definitely recommend is report /PLMB/RCP_TABLEINFO. Its output and its logic should be a good starting point to familiarize yourself with the data model and what data is stored in which table.

Jan

entry.title: Authorization to create CDS views
entry.content:
Hi All,

Can someone please provide if the below auth. are sufficient to create CDS view on HANA DB. If not, please rectify and/or suggest the correct ones

  • REPO.READ
  • REPO.EDIT_NATIVE_OBJECTS
  • REPO.ACTIVATE_NATIVE_OBJECTS
  • REPO.MAINTAIN_NATIVE_PACKAGESSystem privileges
  • REPO.MAINTAIN_DELIVERY_UNITSObject privileges
  • EXECUTE privilege on the database procedure SYS.REPOSITORY_REST.

Regards

Plaban

entry.title: Re: Cost Center - Budget Availability Control
entry.content:
Yes Joachim, All the Postings made in the Expense account with the Cost center are taken into account, and reports get updated in real-time. If you are posting more than 40k through a simple journal entry the system will prompt the message or if you post the J.E with 40k then the cost center budget reports will show you the available budget as “0”.

Thanks & Regards
Arafat Ajmal

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve file content from SAP MDK attachments
entry.content: No, I did not use MDK for this case, and used BPA form as my mobile entry UI.

entry.title: Re: Convert Integer to Hexadecimal
entry.content: Sorry but decimal 10 is hexadecimal A (or 0A or 000A...) Could you please clarify the rule for converting?

want to know how to fix this?

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Production Order - Stock Pick List including B...
entry.content: Thanks Manish 🙂

entry.title: Re: SAP BO 4.3: View Last Instance by Default in One Report
entry.content: As of now it is to be set for all the report. Not possible for single report

entry.title: Schedule Job for Initialize One Exposure Data
entry.content:
Purpose of this blog :- 

  • In this blog post we will discuss the need for template job Schedule Job for Initialize One Exposure Data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.
  • As well as also try to understand what the use for Schedule Job for Initialize One Exposure Data is when we have the App "Memo Record 2.0" for creating the Actual memo records.

Understanding Memo Records:-

With the App Manage Memo Records 2.0, you can create memo records for initial upload of bank account balance in the One Exposure from Operation Hub flows with Memo Record Category ‘ACTMO (Actual Cash Memo)’, that are not yet generated in the system. This serves as a replacement for data migration object FI - Bank account balance (deprecated)

What is One Exposure from Operations Hub.

The One Exposure from Operations hub is a real-time collection point and storage location for operational data. In the One Exposure a certainty level describes the likelihood, or reliability, of a cash flow forecast. Certainty levels are assigned internally by the program based on the source application and the process that generated the cash flow.

The Source Applications can be one of the following :- 

  • Financial Operations
  • Treasury and Risk Management
  • Materials Management
  • Sales and Distribution
  • End-of-Day Bank Statements
  • Memo Records

Along with that, there are some external source applications as well.

Hence, the App Memo Record 2.0 only solves the purpose to create memo records for actual and forecasted cash flows.

Conclusion:-

For all the above mentioned source application where an IBU (Initial Balance Upload) needs to be created we use the Schedule Job for Initialize One Exposure Data. It saves the hassle of selecting from the huge set of data points from these source applications to generate One Exposure from Operations Hub cash flows and can easily generate the Initial Balances Upload by simply selecting the source application.

 

References:- 

Manage Memo Records 2.0

Schedule Job for Initialize One Exposure Data

SAP KBA 3452616 - Bank balance upload for G/L Account is not supported

entry.title: Re: Internal Server Error During MDK Project Deployment o...
entry.content:
@Jitendra_Kansal

Steps followed so far:

  1. Opened the Web Application Factory folder in SAP Business Application Studio.
  2. Built the mtayaml file by selecting Build MTA Project.
  3. Deployed the mtar file from the mtaarchives folder by selecting Deploy MTA Archive.

Even after completing these steps, we're unable to access the MDK web app. Could you provide further guidance or suggest any additional steps we may need to follow?

Thank you for your assistance!

entry.title: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content:
Dear Team

Material Created With MAP and Price/unit is 130 INR(Material Master /MM01/Accounting View/Price Control - MAP)

PO Price Maintained as 220

While Doing GR 101 Movement 2 Accounting Documents & 1 Material Ledger Document(Material is Activated)

Can anyone help

 

MM (Materials Management) SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submit Statement?
entry.content:
I am working on a custom program where I use the SUBMIT statement to call the F.01 transaction. I need to pass a dynamic selection (Profit Center) as a parameter, but I'm facing issues when trying to pass the values.

I’ve tried the following code, which works for standard parameters but not for dynamic selections:

LOOP AT s_values INTO DATA(lv_prctr_value).
  CLEAR ls_dynsel.
  ls_dynsel-selname = 'PRCTR'.            
  ls_dynsel-kind    = 'S'.             
  ls_dynsel-sign    = 'I'.             
  ls_dynsel-option  = 'EQ'.        
  ls_dynsel-low     = lv_prctr_value.  
  APPEND ls_dynsel TO lt_dynsel.
ENDLOOP. 


SUBMIT rfbila00
  WITH sd_ktopl-low = lv_ktopl
  WITH sd_bukrs-low = lv_bukrs
  WITH bilavers = '1000'
  WITH bilaspra = lv_spras
  WITH bilbjahr = lv_report_year
  WITH b-monate =  s_bilabmon
  WITH bilvjahr = lv_compare_year
  WITH v-monate = s_bilavmon
  WITH SELECTION-TABLE lt_dynsel
  EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
  AND RETURN.

I got this profit center field name using technical properties of the field. But i pass 'PRCTR' the values are not loading in it 

How can I pass multiple Profit Center values in dynamic selections when using the SUBMIT statement?


Any insights or examples on handling dynamic selections with SUBMIT would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!"

I will try to check with my company if there is a proxy somewhere, but as this is centrally managed I do not think it would be possible for me to change anything As I have not changed anything and this behaviour is coming from last update of ADT. Is there anyway to installed the previous ADT version: ABAP Core Development Tools 3.42.0

entry.title: Re: Whenever I deployed MDK project in cloud foundry givi...
entry.content: Thanks Jitendra above method is working and we are able to deploy in web. Ping me once when there is permanent fix.

entry.title: BTP server-to-server communication in background jobs with same XSUAA
entry.content:
On the BTP (CF Runtime) I have two servers (CAP NodeJs apps) that are bound to the same XSUAA instance. I would like them to communicate in background jobs (server-to-server). This currently fails on the BTP (403) as the endpoints require app-specific roles which are not included in the token obtained by the OAuth2 ClientCredentials grant flow. According to the xs-security.json documentation scopes may be granted to "authorities" when using the ClientCredentials grant flow. How do I modify the single xs-security.json (see below) used by the XSUAA to make it work?

An example repo can be found here . The explanation is as follows.

The scenario contains two servers: producer and consumer. Once the producer server is served, a background job is started which periodically POSTs the `consume` endpoint of consumer that requires the role "Admin". 

 

// simplified producer init()
    cds.once("served", () => {
      cds.spawn({ every: INTERVAL }, async () => {
        const msg = `Message #${++msgCount}`;

        cds.log("Producer").log("Producing: ", msg);

        const consumerSrv = await cds.connect.to("ConsumerService");
        await consumerSrv.send("consume", {
          msg: msg,
        });
      });
    });

 

service ConsumerService @(path: '/api/consumer/') {
   @(requires: ['Admin'])
   action   consume(msg : String);
}
// consumer init()
  public async init(): Promise<void> {
    await super.init();

    const ConsumerService = await import("../@cds-models/ConsumerService");
    this.on(ConsumerService.consume, (req) => {
      cds.log("Consumer").log("Consuming message of user ", req.user?.id, " : ", req.data.msg);
    });
  }

 

The cds.requires section of producer looks like this:

  "requires": {
    "ConsumerService": {
      "kind": "odata",
      "model": "example.consumer",
      "credentials": {
        "path": "/api/consumer/",
        "[production]": { "destination": "consumer-api" },
        "[development]": {
          "destination": {
            "name": "consumer-api",
            "url": "http://localhost:4005",
            "username": "admin",
            "password": "admin"
          }
        }
      }
    },
    "auth": {
      "[production]": { "kind": "xsuaa" },
      "[development]": {
        "kind": "basic",
        "users": {
          "admin": {
            "password": "admin",
            "roles": ["Admin"]
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },

 

During deployment the destination "consumer-api" is created. The manifest.yaml looks like this:

_schema-version: "3.1"
ID: backgroundjobs
version: 1.0.0
description: "Example project for server-to-server communication in background jobs"
parameters:
  enable-parallel-deployments: true

modules:
  # --------------------- PRODUCER MODULE ------------------------
  - name: backgroundjobs-producer
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    type: nodejs
    path: ../dist/srv/producer
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      memory: 128MB
      disk-quota: 128MB
      command: node ./node_modules/@sap/cds/bin/cds-serve --profile production
    properties:
      OPTIMIZE_MEMORY: true
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      commands: []
    requires:
      - name: backgroundjobs-uaa
      - name: backgroundjobs-destination
      - name: backgroundjobs-consumer
    provides:
      - name: producer-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}

  # --------------------- CONSUMER MODULE ------------------------
  - name: backgroundjobs-consumer
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    type: nodejs
    path: ../dist/srv/consumer
    parameters:
      buildpack: nodejs_buildpack
      memory: 128MB
      disk-quota: 128MB
      command: node ./node_modules/@sap/cds/bin/cds-serve --profile production
    properties:
      OPTIMIZE_MEMORY: true
    build-parameters:
      builder: custom
      commands: []
    requires:
      - name: backgroundjobs-uaa
      - name: backgroundjobs-destination
    provides:
      - name: consumer-api
        properties:
          srv-url: ${default-url}

  # ---------------------- DESTINATIONS --------------------------
  - name: backgroundjobs-destination-content
    # ------------------------------------------------------------
    type: com.sap.application.content
    build-parameters:
      no-source: true
    requires:
      - name: backgroundjobs-destination
        parameters:
          content-target: true
      - name: consumer-api
      - name: backgroundjobs-uaa
        parameters:
          service-key:
            name: ${org}-${space}-backgroundjobs-uaa-key
    parameters:
      content:
        instance:
          existing_destinations_policy: update
          destinations:
            - Name: consumer-api
              URL: ~{consumer-api/srv-url}
              WebIDEEnabled: true
              Authentication: OAuth2ClientCredentials
              HTML5.ForwardAuthToken: false # when enabled, the ClientCredentials flow is not triggered and we need that in background jobs
              TokenServiceURLType: Dedicated
              TokenServiceInstanceName: ${org}-${space}-backgroundjobs-uaa
              TokenServiceKeyName: ${org}-${space}-backgroundjobs-uaa-key

resources:
  - name: backgroundjobs-uaa
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-name: ${org}-${space}-backgroundjobs-uaa
      service: xsuaa
      service-plan: application
      path: ./xs-security.json
      config:
        xsappname: ${org}-${space}-backgroundjobs
      service-keys:
        - name: ${org}-${space}-backgroundjobs-uaa-key
  - name: backgroundjobs-destination
    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service
    parameters:
      service-name: ${org}-${space}-backgroundjobs-destination
      service: destination
      service-plan: lite

 

And the xs-security.json:

{
  "xsappname": "${default-xsappname}",
  "tenant-mode": "dedicated",
  "scopes": [
    {
      "name": "$XSAPPNAME.Admin"
    }
  ],
  "attributes": [],
  "role-templates": [
    {
      "name": "Admin",
      "description": "",
      "scope-references": ["$XSAPPNAME.Admin"],
      "attribute-references": []
    }
  ],
  "oauth2-configuration": {
    "redirect-uris": ["https://*.hana.ondemand.com/**"]
  }
}

entry.title: Sync Sales Performance Titles with IPS Groups
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm using the Top-Down User Synchronization to sync Administrators and Participants between Incentive Management and the Identity Authentication Service (IAS). In IAS I can use Conditional Authentication to redirect company users to the company IDP based on the email domain. 

For Participants I'm struggling to setup the right condition. Participants are synced with Sales Performance automatically and can be identified in IAS because they are members of the AUTHENTICATED_COMM-SCAN group. In my case however I need to redirect Participants to several different IDP's.

In Sales Performance I can use the Title to assign permissions so I was wondering if I could use the same Title to add the user to an IAS group. Titles are however not returned in the SCIM Users API.

As a work-around I could add Groups to Sales Performance and add all the users to there respective group but this requires an additional step that is not needed for permission assignment, as those come from the Title.

entry.title: How to delete a user from Manage Workforce App
entry.content:
In Manage workforce App, not able to delete any user.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to delete a user from Manage Workforce App
entry.content:
To delete the user in "Manage Workforce" application you have to use the ILM process.

To check more about ILM process, refer to the blog.

You can also refer to this KBA 2922814 - How to Delete Employee Data in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Thanks!

Unable to log on : Could not connect to Server <>. Please check that the server name is correct and running.

thanks

Rahul

Please check the available CDS views in this APP too. You can refer to the following link for more details: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/2d4fb4ae428948d48bd4fca10ceced9d.html

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content:
Check whether Mateial master accounting view1, May it update another currency price also.

That is why a PRY accounting entry has been generated.

entry.title: Re: Convert Integer to Hexadecimal
entry.content:
Hi Sandra!
Yes, 10 is A in hexadecimal.
Current code reads 10 as 010 which is wrong.
Needed to find a conversion for this one.

entry.title: Re: Download File on Action in CAP / Java Application
entry.content:
Unfortunately I am not able to share my codebase as this an internal project of a company i work for.

I can however share some essential and streamlined snippets to get a better understanding of what I have done so far. Good new is that the solution you suggested works using the virtual attribute.  Bad news is that I am not sure how to dynamically render the link for this particular attribute that holds the data so a user could just simply click download.

Here is what I have so far. Probably not the best solution but Im still trying to grasp the essentials of CAP.
My streamlined entity : 

And an Event Handler whose job is to determine wheter a READ event is executed that contains ONLY the parameter ExportData. If so, this attribute is returned with custom logic. If not, then no ExportData is fetched as it's a virtual attribute and doesnt exist in database : 

 @On(event = CqnService.EVENT_READ, entity = CustomBusinessObject_.CDS_NAME)
    public void onServeExportedData(CdsReadEventContext context) {
        CqnSelect select = context.getCqn();
        if (select.items().size() == 1 && select.items().getFirst().asRef().targetSegment().id().equals(CustomBusinessObject.EXPORT_DATA)) {
            List<Map<String, Object>> rows = new ArrayList<>();
            CqnSelect dbSelect = assembleCqnSelectFromKeys(analyzer.analyze(select).targetKeys());
            List<CustomBusinessObject> cbos = cboImportService.run(dbSelect).listOf(CustomBusinessObject.class);

            cbos.forEach(cbo -> {
                ArrayNode arrayNode = oDataApiCallerService.callReadOdataApi(cbo);
                InputStream is = new ByteArrayInputStream(arrayNode.toString().getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8));
                Map<String, Object> row = new HashMap<>();
                row.put(CustomBusinessObject.EXPORT_DATA, is);
                rows.add(row);
            });
            context.setResult(rows);
        }
    }

 Implementation is a bit wonky but somehow works. No custom logic is executed when reading the entity, but once i make a GET request to localhost://myentityService/myEntity(ID=123)/ExportData , indeed the file is downloaded just as i wanted to.
Now however I struggle with the generation of the dynamic link to this particular entity attribute on the UI side.
This is my first ever project with CAP and Fiori and this is pretty much the last piece of basic functionality i need before I can make improvements. I very much appreciate your input

BR
Sebastian

entry.title: Re: Custom Error handling in UDF, SAP PI/PO
entry.content:
Hi ,

Please use XSLT mapping for this Issue . 

<xsl:template match="/">
<xsl:choose>
<xsl:when test="recs = 0">
<xsl:value-of select="'No price changes detected, skipping price update.'"/>
</xsl:when>
<xsl:otherwise>
<!-- Process normal price change logic -->
<xsl:value-of select="'Price change detected, processing update.'"/>
</xsl:otherwise>
</xsl:choose>
</xsl:template>

Regards,

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content:
No Only one Currency Maintained for 10 Quantity = 10 * 130 = 1300(BSX)

10*220 = 2200(WRX)

entry.title: SAP PO FILE adapter additional file not keeping original file type in MAIL adapter as attachment
entry.content:
I have FILE to MAIL scenario. File sender is processing two file FileToMail.mail and FileToMail.csv. The first one serves as mail body and second one as attachment processed by additional files option in file adapter.

The issue is that FileToMail.csv is attaching as FileToMail.xml and i dont know why. I cant find the reason why is it changing its extension from .csv to .xml and tried many things to fix it without success.

Here is my file sender:

and here is my mail receiver:

I upload these two files into ftp

and result is always this. Mail body correctly processed but attachment with wrong extension:

entry.title: Re: How to receive and invoice bitcoin in SAP - Proof of Concept
entry.content:
Hi Koni,

SAP does some development but unfortunately not on bitcoin blockchain or bitcoin L2 implementation like Lightning or Liquid. See following link Payments without boundaries: Embark on the future ... - SAP Community

"SAP Digital Currency Hub currently supports PYUSD on the Ethereum and USDC on the Ethereum and Polygon blockchain"

It seems that blockchain technology is seen as payment layer by SAP and not as asset layer.

I will try to get in contact with 

  • SAP Digital Currency Hub

entry.title: Re: Using on-premise systems in your SAP Cloud Identity Services tenant
entry.content:
Dear @rtok ,

First, I'd like to mention that the IPS connector for SAP Application Server ABAP (AS ABAP) source system uses specific Business Application Programming Interface (BAPI) functional modules. You can see which they are in the documentation for this source provisioning system: https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/sap-application-server-abap?locale=en-US

If you develop custom function modules in ABAP, they won't be consumable by the IPS connector for this source system.

If you use the ones that are already implemented in the IPS connector for the AS ABAP source system, then you can take advantage of the *.filter properties. They are described in the above-mentioned documentation page. They can help in making IPS read only some users, not all of them, from the source system. Conditions on "user" or "group" section of the transformation of the provisioning system can also be used to limit further which entities IPS provisions to the target system, and which would be skipped.

Regarding the termination of user accounts on the target system - do you mean user deletion or user deactivation? Some target systems support the latter, and most support the former (with very few exceptions - you can identify them if the default transformation for a target system contains "skipOperations":["delete"] in the "user" section of the transformation). If it is deletion - then the assigned roles should not contain the user any longer, once it is deleted from the target system. If it is deactivation, however, then it needs to be considered further how to achieve the desired behavior based on the type of the target system.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Note 3537136 (BEN: Annual limits for tax year 2025) has been released.

Carlos

entry.title: Re: Everything about using SAP Business Transformation center for SDT S/4 HANA Conversion 2023 from
entry.content:
Hi ,

Great blog! The explanation of Selective Data Transition (SDT) methods—Shell Conversion and Mix & Match—was very clear. I appreciate how you outlined the role of SAP BTC in streamlining the migration process to S/4HANA, especially with the integration into SAP Cloud ALM and no additional licensing costs for eligible customers. The step-by-step guide on accessing the tools and demo environment is also very useful.

Thanks for sharing this helpful overview!

Regards ,

entry.title: [VBA] GuiOfficeIntegration : Long text and how to update document opened in Word
entry.content:
Hello,

I have field which, when updated, opens a word document. I then type text in the word document, then click on F3 (back button) and the text I typed is displayed in the field.

I recorded this action to get the vbscript.

Here it is:

session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/tabsTAB_STRIP/tabpTAB_STRIP_FC4/ssubTAB_STRIP_SCA:SAPLZUE_EDIT_DISPLAY:9002/btnRC_LT").press
session.findById("wnd[0]/usr/cntlSCMSW_CONTAINER_2102/shellcont/shell").setDocument 1,"the text I want to insert in base64 very long text"
session.findById("wnd[0]/tbar[0]/btn[3]").press

When I execute this code, what happens is the word document which is initially opened is closed, a new one opens, my text is put inside of it and the back button is pressed.

The problem is my text is not saved. I presume it is because SAP gets the content of the first word file initially opened.

Is there any way I can achieve what I am trying to achieve with VBA (i.e. : insert my text in the initial word document) without the use of SendKeys ?

Thanks

Hi ,

Regards,

entry.title: Streamlining Compliance with SAP Localization for Qatar Withholding Tax and Payment Retentions.
entry.content:
Compliance with local regulations is crucial for seamless operations in today's global business environment. For businesses operating in Qatar, understanding and adhering to the local requirements for supplier payment retentions and withholding tax (WHT) is essential. SAP’s localization solution for Qatar offers a robust framework to ensure compliance with these regulations, as outlined in Circular No. 2 from 2011.

Understanding the Regulatory Landscape

Qatar’s tax regulations mandate that certain final contract amounts must be retained from payments made to temporary branches. This retention is either 3% of the contract value (excluding the val

ue of supply and work carried out abroad) or the final contractual payment, whichever is higher. The retained amount is held until the temporary branch provides a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the General Tax Authority (GTA).

SAP Localization Solution for Qatar

SAP’s localization solution for Qatar was developed to help businesses streamline compliance with these regulations efficiently. The solution integrates seamlessly with SAP S/4HANA and SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, providing automated processes for managing supplier payment retentions and withholding tax.

The solution integrates the specific requirements for supplier payment retentions and withholding tax into the SAP system, ensuring that all necessary checks and validations are performed automatically.

Key Features

    1. Automated Validation:
      • The SAP localization solution automatically checks the company code, tax card, and commercial registration status, ensuring compliance before processing payments.

        To activate the enhanced solution for retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA using the customizing “Activate Enhanced Localization for Withholding Tax and Retention for Qatar” (view V_FIAPQAC_AP_MIG). Learn more about the activation of enhanced solution at this link.
        To activate retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, use “Activate Validations for Withholding Tax and Payment Retention Liability” (SSCUI ID: 105883).
        The activation blocks excess payments to suppliers.
        Maintain unique payment block reasons with “Check Payment Block Reason” (SSCUI ID: 101040).
        For automatic payments, map these reasons using “Specify Payment Blocks for Validation Categories” (SSCUI ID: 104350).

         

    2. Retention Logic:
      • The solution includes the latest QA retention logic, ensuring that payments are withheld appropriately based on the supplier's compliance status.
      • The solution automatically calculates the retention amount based on the contract value and the specific criteria outlined in the regulations.
      • Before processing payments, the solution checks for the presence of a valid NOC from the GTA. If the NOC is not available, the payment is retained.

  1. Withholding Tax Calculation:
    • The solution ensures that withholding tax is applied correctly based on the supplier’s residency status, registration status, contract duration, and the necessary certificates as required by law.

  2. Error Handling and Warnings:
    • The system raises appropriate warnings and errors if any compliance issues are detected with the supplier’s tax card or commercial registration, preventing non-compliant payments from being processed.

Ensuring Smooth Operations

By leveraging SAP’s localization solution, businesses can ensure compliance with Qatar’s regulatory requirements, minimizing the risk of penalties and operational disruptions. The solution's automated processes and comprehensive checks streamline the management of supplier payments and withholding tax, allowing businesses to focus on their core operations.

Supplier Payment Retentions and Withholding Tax

Supplier payment retentions and withholding tax are standard practices to ensure that suppliers fulfill their contractual obligations. In Qatar, the process involves several key steps and checks:

  1. Payment Initiation: The process begins with initiating a payment in the SAP system.

  2. Company Code Validation: The system checks if the payment is associated with a Qatar company code.
    • If not, the payment proceeds without additional checks.
    • If yes, the system proceeds to the next step.

  3. Retention Logic Activation: The system verifies if the new retention logic is active.
    • If not, the old retention solution is applied.
    • If yes, the system continues with the new logic.
  4. QFC Certificate Validation: The system checks for a valid QFC (Qatar Financial Centre) certificate.
    • If valid, the process continues.
    • If not, the old retention solution is applied.

  5. Residency, Tax Card Checks, and Commercial Registration: The system verifies the supplier's residency status and the availability of a tax card. Payments cannot be made to suppliers with expired commercial registrations or a tax card that was not presented.
    • Use the country-specific tab in the Maintain Business Partner app master to manage the Supplier's Tax Card and Residency status. Learn more about Qatar's Tax Card at this link.
    • Use the country-specific tab in the Maintain Business Partner app master to manage the Supplier's Certificates and residency status. Learn more about the Supplier Certificate at this link.
Retention Scenarios for non-resident suppliers:

A non-resident supplier has a non-permanent branch linked to a specific period or project at least one year

  • Retain all payments under the contract until a tax card is presented. 
  • Retain the final payment or 3% of the contract value (whichever is higher) until a valid NOC from the GTA is presented.

A non-resident supplier has a permanent branch registered in the Commercial Register.

  • Retain the final payment under the contract until a tax card is presented.

Retention Scenarios for Resident Suppliers:

A resident supplier does not have a tax card

  • Retain the final payment under the contract until a tax card is presented.

 

Withholding Tax (WHT):

Withholding tax is crucial to Qatar's tax system, particularly for non-resident suppliers. The key points include:

  1. Liability: Suppliers must ensure their tax cards and valid commercial registrations to avoid payment disruptions.
      • The Withholding tax applies to payments made to non-resident suppliers who are not registered in the Commercial Register or are registered for short-term activity contracts for less than a year.
      • The withholding tax is also applicable if the commercial registration of a non-resident supplier has expired.
      • The automatic determination of Withholding Tax for services is based on Material Group Classification as local, foreign, or exempt. For local services, it uses the configuration step Specify Service Origin and Withholding Tax Codes for Material Groups. 

        To activate the enhanced solution for retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA using the customizing “Specift Service Origin and Withholding Tax Codes for Material Groups” (view FIWTQAV_MGC). Learn more about the activation of enhanced solution at this link.
        To activate retention-based validations in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, use “Specift Service Origin and Withholding Tax Codes for Material Groups” (SSCUI ID: 104295).
        Withholding tax only applies to local services. When multiple codes exist in the supplier master data, a single tax code is selected for purchase order-based and supplier invoices.

        The supplier is subject to a couple of withholding taxes related to two services.


        Only one Withholding Tax code has been captured based on the Material Group Classification assigned



  2. Statutory Reports and Supplier Certificates: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance enables you to process and monitor the statutory reports for the use of your businesses with operations in Qatar. It comprises functions designed for laws and business practices. As a result, your business stays compliant with local legal obligations in Qatar for the following statutory reports:
    • Withholding Tax Declaration report.
    • The Withholding Tax Certificate is a correspondence form that generates all withholding tax certificates for foreign suppliers based on withholding tax transactions from the Withholding Tax Declaration report.

Conclusion

Compliance with local regulations is a critical aspect of doing business in Qatar. SAP’s localization solution for Qatar offers a comprehensive framework to efficiently manage supplier payment retentions and withholding tax. By automating key processes and ensuring rigorous compliance checks, the solution helps businesses easily navigate the complexities of Qatar’s regulatory landscape.

Useful Links

  • Learn more about the enhanced solution for Qatar Withholding Tax and Payment Retention at this link.
  • Learn more about the withholding tax statutory reports available for Qatar at this link.
  • Learn more about the old solution in SAP S/4HANA at this link.

entry.title: Commerce Cloud: OCC V2 stateless (for Spartacus) with synchronous order management (LORD in SAP R3)
entry.content:
Hey at all,

i try to figure out the following: Is there a default way to use SOM (LORD with SAP R3) in comibination with OCC V2 (stateless) with spartacus?

Now in Detail:
We are trying to implement Spartacus (Composable Storefront) at the moment. Actually we are using the default b2b storefront with SAP R3 and the synchronous order management (Lean order management).
I checked out the standard code and in - for example - DefaultBolCartFacade -> public Basket getCart(). There the code is referencing to bean 'sapOrdermgmtCartBO' which is stored in the scope called 'sapSession'.
Of course the session scope - and the sapSession - in the OCC V2 is not available anymore because of the stateless system. So its not possible to store the ERP Basket in the sapSession.
How to handle this situation? Do we have to implement our own solution or is there something which i can use from SAP?
Have someone the same situation?

Thank you all!!

entry.title: Re: Internal reconciliation is not asking for the reconciliation date
entry.content: I’m encountering a similar issue with internal reconciliation for a business partner whose reconciliation currency differs from the local currency. When performing the reconciliation with admin rights, I’m able to post it on the specified date, 31.10.24. However, when attempting this as any other user, a message appears stating, 'The exchange rate tax will be posted with the current system date,' and if I proceed, the reconciliation is posted as today’s date. I've reviewed all relevant permissions but haven’t identified the one affecting this setting. Any insights or solutions would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.
entry.content:
Hi all,

In List report of fiori elements application when adding the progressive indicator in list page table i am getting error that 
Error: adding element with duplicate id 'listrepnorthwind::sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage.view.Details::Products--dataPoint::UnitsInStock::Label'  

please help me how to resolve it?

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content: When the ML activated and MAP is diffrent from the PO price two accounting documents will be genarated.

entry.title: Re: What is the Applied date in the applied transaction window.
entry.content: I have the same issue but I can do the reconciliation myself as Admin with the chosen date, any other user posts it with current date. I can't find in the authorisations something to fix this. Any idea which authorisation is the one affecting this?

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: I tried it. But have doubts. Point 1: We can move the 50% expired batches to production MRP area. But at the beginning the produced material will be places at Production MPR area as I mentioned Production storage location in material right. Then is it needed to move this new material manually to sales MRP area to consider this for sales orders.

entry.title: Re: 2 Accounting Documents Creation During MIGO Process
entry.content: One with MAP, and second one is differnt between MAP and PO price. Even though two account documents are generated net effect will be same,

entry.title: Re: What is the Applied date in the applied transaction window.
entry.content: As an admin I can reconcile the BP in FC as 31.10.24 but not as other user. Any idea which authorisation is the one relevant for this? Thanks

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: Point 2: So now all the new materials will be in sales MRP area. In case we don't have any sale order. Suddenly we got dependent requirement from prd MRP area. Then this new material stock available in sales MRP area will not be considered for dependent requirements right. How to mitigate this

entry.title: 404 Not Found: Requested route ('859a5208trial-dev-nsdemosampleapp-approuter.cfapps.us10-001.hana.on
Re: How to handle exceptions in Odata receiver adapter in...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

unfortunately, there seems to be no easy configuration for the OData adapter.

The obvious answer would be to use a HTTP receiver instead of OData.

 

If, for whatever reason, Odata is required for your use case, Irvinrufus described a possible solution in this blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-cpi-exception-handling-tips-return-to-main-flow/ba-p/13571453

 

In the example below, I implemented an iFlow that is similar to your requirement:

 

 

There are 2 OData calls:

  • First call (Request Reply 1) determines if the iFlow is relevant to this use case.
    If not, the OData will return 404. This must not fail the message processing but is considered a "regular" termination of the process.
  • Second call (getProductDetails) shall only be executed if the iFlow is relevant.
    Any error here (or later in the iFlow) should lead to the CPI message failing.

 

In an ideal world, you would use a Router to determine if an exception should lead to failure or not.

Unfortunately, Router is not supported within the exception flow. That’s why I used process call to handle further processing outside the exception sub process.

 

See below for the configuration of the router to achieve this behavior:

 

 

 

 

Hope this helps.

entry.title: Complex Type Access from EDMX file
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to access a complex type property from an EDMX file metadata. But I am unable to expose it under my entity. Inspite of taking the approach in different ways, I couldnt establish the service.

API_MANAGE_WORKFORCE_TIMESHEET is the API
Recorded Hours need to be exposed.

Please do the needful if you know anything

Thanks

entry.title: Re: 50% self life materials to be not considered for sale...
entry.content: Point 3: In sales order I have given the sales MRP area and in PIR for header material, I have given production MRP area. I maintained the production supply area in component to pass the dependent requirement to production MRP area. Now how the production order will consider the stock from Sales MRP area if the stock is not there in production MRP area. How the PIR need to be maintained for production at header level. How the MRP to be run. At Plant level or Production / sales MRP area level?

entry.title: Handling Sales Order Restrictions When Planned Orders Are Created
entry.content:
Hello,

We have below business requirement for Make to Order.

Whenever a sales order is created for a make-to-order product, once a planned order is generated for the sales order after the MRP run, the system should not allow any amendments to the sales order.

Best Regards

Vivek Savant

entry.title: Re: Customer Checkout integration with VIVA
entry.content:
Hi Lorenz,

Thanks for your reply! Yes, you can use a custom plugin within CCO to trigger communication with a microservice. The plugin acts as a bridge, calling the microservice via a defined REST or SOAP endpoint. You’ll configure the plugin with the microservice’s URL, authentication details, and parameters. Once set up, CCO triggers the plugin as part of the communication flow.

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submit Statement?
entry.content: Hi Sandeep, is the profit center a parameter of the standard selection of F.01 or is it a free selection parameter?

entry.title: Re: Convert Integer to Hexadecimal
entry.content:
It works as expected, the line is found:

TYPES:
  BEGIN OF ts_itab_line,
    hex TYPE x LENGTH 8,
  END OF ts_itab_line.
TYPES tt_itab TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ts_itab_line WITH EMPTY KEY.
DATA(itab) = VALUE tt_itab( ( hex = '000000000000000A' ) ).
LOOP AT itab ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<line>) WHERE hex = 10.
  WRITE / 'found'.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: Re: I want to fetch the sgtxt on sap script form on main...
entry.content: What didn't you understand in my answer? Do you know what is a global variable? Is LW_REFER a global variable?

entry.title: Re: Payroll Canada Year End 2024
entry.content:
Hello Venkatesh @VEH2,

Unless explicitly configured differently in BPVAL configuration option, BPA is collected from the federal (463) and provincial (462) infotypes during payroll processing. This means that those infotypes need to be updated.

Many customers use Tax Update Utility (program RPUTXUK0) to mass-update the infotypes for all employees. You can evaluate and test that option in a controlled environment.

Regards,

Jonas

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submi...
entry.content: Read the ABAP documentation. For logical databases, use WITH FREE SELECTIONS.

entry.title: Re: How to Pass Dynamic Selection Field in SAP ABAP Submi...
entry.content:
Hi Sandeep,

is the profit center a parameter of the standard selection of F.01 or is it a free selection parameter?

For a free selection parameter you have to use WITH FREE SELECTIONS:

 

SUBMIT rfbila00 ... 
   VIA SELECTION-SCREEN
   WITH FREE SELECTIONS texpr.

 

See example here.

entry.title: Re: Extract Long Text from Notification or Work Order
entry.content:
Hey Sorin,

thank you for that example! To be honest I do not understand how that can be helpful. If you have only one notification or one order you can always open the notification or the order and see the long text directly in it. 

I am looking for a possibility to use the read_text functionality to read lots of longtext from lots of notifications atm...

entry.title: Re: Regarding the "The service metadata is invalid" error...
entry.content: I have the same issue as you described above, but unfortunately this solution did not solve the problem for me 😕

entry.title: BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE not setting RESB-KZEAR field
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are trying to set the RESB-KZEAR field via BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE but it is not happening .

We are passing the below Fields in FM.

goodsmvt_code -proj = '03'.

       goodsmvt_header -pstng_date      = sy-datum.
        goodsmvt_header -doc_date        = sy-datum.

       goodsmvt_item -material          = wa_mspr_proj-matnr.
       goodsmvt_item -plant             = wa_mspr_proj-werks.
        goodsmvt_item -stge_loc          = wa_mspr_proj-lgort.
    goodsmvt_item -move_type         = '281'.
        goodsmvt_item -spec_stock        = wa_mspr_proj-sobkz.
goodsmvt_item -entry_qnt         = wa_mspr_proj-prlab.
      goodsmvt_item -entry_uom         = wa_mspr_proj-meins.
  goodsmvt_item -mvt_ind           = space.
      goodsmvt_item -val_wbs_elem      = wa_wbs.
      goodsmvt_item -reserv_no         = wa_mspr_proj-rsnum.
        goodsmvt_item -res_item          = wa_mspr_proj-rspos.
      goodsmvt_item -activity          = wa_mspr_proj-vornr.
    goodsmvt_item -batch             = wa_mspr_proj-charg.    "" INS 134598
       goodsmvt_item -item_text         = 'Automatic posting'.
        goodsmvt_item -withdrawn         = 'X'.
Can some one please tell me if we are missing any field here so that the Indicator is not being set.

Thanking In Advance!

entry.title: Re: #CoE #DH01 Import Account Balance from the Bank
entry.content: Hello, I have completed all the necessary settings in Bank Statements and selected “Manual Entry” and “Spreadsheet Import of Balances” to be allowed. However, in the Bank Account Level - Relationship Tab - Balance Update Method, these entries are not allowed, and I cannot edit them. Do you know how to enable the “Balance from Manual Entry” and “Enable Balance from Spreadsheet” options in order to use the Manage Bank Account Balances Fiori app? Thank you.
